project_type: Premium F&B Digital Ecosystem & Automated Commercial Booking Engine

roi_calculation.problem: Fotografer komersial menggunakan spot kafe gratis/hanya beli 1 kopi (Loss Rp 15.000.000/bulan).
roi_calculation.solution: Digital gatekeeping dengan Booking Engine. Paket termurah Rp 750.000, paket termahal Rp 2.500.000.
roi_calculation.break_even_point: Hanya membutuhkan 10 booking paket Commercial (Rp 1.500.000) untuk ROI 100% dari biaya setup di bulan pertama.

deliverables: Automated Photography Booking System with Date Picker
